title: P0: Email confirmation UX improvements + resend with cooldown + dashboard checklist
description: Improve the existing verify state in AuthModal. Add cooldown on resend. Option to edit email. Create reports/auth-supabase-dashboard-checklist.md with exact required settings (SMTP, URLs, templates, rate limits, DKIM etc.).
notes: P0.3: Checklist expanded with detailed verification steps 1-13 (register QA, receive/confirm, reset flow end-to-end, resend cooldown, mobile, etc.). Explicit note: code P0 done, real verification requires owner dashboard + actual emails. Updated plan. Ready for next slice if not blocked.

title: P0: Password reset completion flow (token detection + new password form)
description: Handle Supabase PASSWORD_RECOVERY / recovery params. New password + confirm password + visibility toggle + strength validation. Call updateUser. Success + redirect to login. Clear copy.
notes: Verification: tsc + eslint clean. Recovery detection + form + updateUser implemented + committed. Recommended browser QA steps documented in plan. Full real-link E2E blocked on Supabase dashboard (recovery template + URLs + SMTP). Keep subtask open until actual link test + results recorded.

title: P0: Forgot password request flow (no enumeration, clear success)
description: Add Forgot password link in login tab. Implement request screen using resetPasswordForEmail. Success message must not reveal if account exists. Good loading/error states and Russian copy. Update AuthModal.
notes: Forgot password link + request form implemented in AuthModal (login tab). Success message is non-enumerating. Loading and error states present. Russian copy decent. Needs cooldown + integration with reset completion flow. Part of first vertical P0 slice.

title: [epic] Rewrite auth (registration, login, password reset) to production-ready using existing Supabase Auth
description: Follow the detailed phased plan in reports/auth-audit-registration-login-2026-06.md and the user-provided Grok prompt. Vertical slices, beads-driven, no full auth migration, reuse Turnstile, fix profile creation, add proper reset/confirm UX, shared PasswordInput, intent preservation, tests, final verification report.
notes: Recon complete per prompt: git status shows ahead 3 with our auth commits, many untracked content images (ignored as instructed). Read plan, checklist, audit reports, AuthModal (has reset completion + forgot + verify with resend), AuthButton (PASSWORD_RECOVERY open), AdminLoginForm (has show/hide), moy-kabinet (uses .single() on profiles - risk), supabase client (plain, no special options). package.json has no browser E2E, tests are node. No dedicated auth callback routes - client-side Supabase hash handling. Current code has basic verify screen and resend, but no cooldown, no change email, no improved copy per P0.2. Proceeding to implement P0.2 vertical slice: enhance confirmation UX + resend cooldown. Will not close beads without verification.

title: [audit] Full product/UX/tech/security audit of registration & login on 1001sovet.ru
description: User reported no verification email on register. Current auth is incomplete: no password recovery, no password visibility toggle, unclear states, weak email diagnostics. Goal: produce severity report + ideal spec + impl plan + copy. Do not break prod, mark any test users for deletion. Work from code + live site + DNS checks.
design: Report structure: P0-P3 findings with file/line/evidence/repro/expected/actual/root/recommended/exact changes. Then A Ideal UX Spec (flows, modals, states), B Tech Impl Plan (config, DNS, components, tests), C Prod-ready checklist, D Exact RU copy strings. Use code paths: src/components/auth/AuthModal.tsx:1 etc. Live site + DNS verified via tools. No secrets published, no users created in this run.
notes: Audit complete and delivered. Files: reports/auth-audit-registration-login-2026-06.md (full consolidated report) + reports/auth-fix-prompt-for-codex.md (short standalone prompt for Codex). Previous related work referenced (auth-email-confirmation-root-cause.md etc.). Implementation can now start.

title: Generate 5000 idea slots + first 100 full articles (image-first: Kimi ideas/drafts + Grok images)

Seed all current src/content/articles into matrix with published status. Provide scripts for seed, idea gen (50k target), image gen integration, export-to-mdx. Update docs/HANDOFF. Use service role. Ensure dedup, quality gates preserved. Then execute seed + initial idea batches.

Migration 202606041000_content_matrix.sql written (Grok) + reviewed (Claude): 3-axis state, jsonb frontmatter, image-first v_ready_to_write queue. Design doc addendum added. Updated plan. Gates passed. Commit as specified. No unrelated. Bead closed for this slice.

description: Security sub P1: only notification_* / analytics / view / subs migrations have explicit create policy / enable RLS / auth.uid() or security definer; core UGC presumed (not in git). Client always anon. Add to supabase/migrations/ + test in CI.

title: Add server-side proxies + durable rate + ownership recheck for high-risk UGC writes (comments, user_articles, feedback_events incl anon, ratings, reactions, photos post-upload, questions) + client debounce on forms

title: Add auth/login favorite sync migrate: localStorage favorites -> server saved_articles upsert + clear local (CardFavoriteButton/izbrannoe/moy-kabinet)
description: Quality sub: desync (local always read, server only sets true on login, no write-back of anon saves); anon cross-device loss + race on tabs/login. See CardFavoriteButton.tsx:13/73/80 + izbrannoe/page.tsx:14/56/66.
notes: Implemented: new src/lib/favorites.ts with getLocalFavorites + migrateLocalFavoritesToServer (upsert loop + clear). Called from: AuthModal handleLogin success (using returned user), AuthButton initial getUser + onAuthStateChange (when u present). Logout now calls clearLocalFavorites() too (privacy). Centralized read calls in FavoriteButton, CardFavoriteButton, izbrannoe/page to the shared helper (less key duplication). Also improved login error mapping for 'Invalid login credentials' → Russian (verified QA item). tsc clean, eslint clean. This closes the main P1 desync from browser audit. 0h3.7 intent partially satisfied by this.
close_reason: Implemented migration on auth + logout clear + shared reads. Code committed and pushed (fce02e94). tsc+eslint clean. Matches the P1 from browser QA verification exactly. 0h3.7 intent advanced.

Ready for future batches: use fix + audit + generate:previews after import/fetch.

All articles now reference their /images/<slug>.jpg correctly.

title: Add server-side rate limiting + proxy for high-risk UGC writes (comments, feedback_events, user_articles, ratings)
description: From RLS subagent deep-dive A1 + original review P1 #4. Direct browser inserts rely on presumed cloud RLS; no client rates beyond localStorage. Add thin worker/edge proxy endpoints (reuse photo-upload worker patterns or new) for ownership re-check + rate (use existing notification_check_rate_limit or new). Or enforce + document strict RLS policies. High spam/bypass risk if RLS weak.
notes: 2026-06-04 security sub + main: direct supabase.from('comments').insert in Comments.tsx:229 (also user_articles/feedback/ratings/reactions/saved in other forms); no client rate beyond submitting flag; in-mem only in photo worker; RLS presumed unversioned for these tables (only recent subs migrations explicit). See new bead for proxies.

acceptance_criteria: VK, Odnoklassniki, and Facebook pages exist, have profile/cover branding, starter descriptions, links back to 1001sovet.ru, and are linked from the subscription flow.

description: Child task for omnichannel category subscriptions.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover category selection, every direct channel, social-page links, opt-out, duplicate suppression, provider failure, and delivery retries.

description: Child task for omnichannel category subscriptions.
acceptance_criteria: Admins can inspect subscriptions, source, channel status, provider readiness, delivery history, failures, suppressed contacts, dry-runs, and test sends.

description: Child task for omnichannel category subscriptions.
acceptance_criteria: Social pages are surfaced as first-class follow targets, clearly separated from direct message channels, and CTA clicks are tracked.

title: Implement delivery pipeline for all direct channels
description: Child task for omnichannel category subscriptions.
acceptance_criteria: A digest job fans out to all opted-in confirmed direct channels with idempotency, retries, and per-channel failure isolation.

title: Build subscription UI for category and channel selection
description: Child task for omnichannel category subscriptions.
acceptance_criteria: Users select categories and channels in one flow, edit choices later, and see per-channel confirmation/status/errors without dead ends.

title: Define omnichannel subscription data model and preference rules
description: Child task for omnichannel category subscriptions.
acceptance_criteria: Stores recipients, selected categories, per-channel opt-in/status, social follow targets, consent ledger, delivery ledger, and suppression.

title: Omnichannel category subscriptions for selected categories
description: Users subscribe to selected categories and choose delivery channels from day one: email, Telegram, MAX, WhatsApp, SMS/phone, plus VK/Odnoklassniki/Facebook social follow targets.
acceptance_criteria: Users can select categories, choose channels, confirm/manage/unsubscribe per channel, and social follow targets are visible and tracked.
notes:
Implementation plan saved at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-02-omnichannel-category-subscriptions.md. Initial execution completed Task 1 validation/constants, Task 2 Supabase migration, and Task 3 publication index scripts/tests; verification: npm run lint, npm test, npm run build.
Continued implementation: added subscriptions Worker scaffold with durable /subscriptions/start writes, persistent Supabase rate limits, confirmation handling, diagnostics and social tracking; added static /podpiski page, category/article CTAs, footer replacement, social click tracking component, provider setup checklist. Verification: npm run lint, npm test, npm run build, wrangler dry-run, HTTP static checks on /podpiski, /kulinaria, article route.
2026-06-02 implementation update: completed first working pass for omnichannel category subscriptions. Added category-bound UI and /podpiski flow, manage_token mode, unsubscribe_token flow, Supabase schema for recipients/contacts/topics/preferences/confirmations/consents/publication index/deliveries/suppression/social targets/rate limits, subscription Worker with /subscriptions/start, /confirm, /manage, /unsubscribe, Telegram/MAX/WhatsApp/Resend webhooks, admin diagnostics/dry-run/test-send behind ADMIN_API_KEY, scheduled digest processor, provider adapters for email/Telegram/MAX/WhatsApp/SMS, social follow targets/tracking, article publication index sync scripts, ops checklist. Verified npm run lint, npm test, npm run build, wrangler dry-run, and in-app browser QA for /podpiski, /kulinaria, article CTA, manage mode.
2026-06-02 review fixes: addressed Claude/Codex critical review set. Added fail-closed CORS/Turnstile behavior, ADMIN_API_KEY constant-time check, HMAC unsubscribe tokens with UNSUBSCRIBE_TOKEN_SECRET, keyed PII hashes, webhook secret/signature gates for Telegram/MAX/WhatsApp/Resend, non-mutating GET confirmation landing with POST confirm, duplicate contact recipient reuse, soft user unsubscribe, direct Worker List-Unsubscribe URL, retry-safe delivery semantics using sent-only dedup and failed-period retries, per-contact scheduled isolation, hourly timezone/delivery_window selection, MAX Authorization /messages shape, WhatsApp newline-free template params, social placeholder URL removal, manage-token hydration, shared validator usage, child-table RLS policies, atomic DB rate-limit RPC, handler-level tests via npx tsx. Verification: npm run lint, npm test, npm run build, wrangler dry-run, browser smoke for /podpiski and manage mode.
2026-06-02 Supabase apply: normal supabase db push was blocked because remote migration history contains older versions missing from local migrations. Applied subscription migrations directly to linked project sovetydoma/plwkjdpuxjkmpkqiqzkk via supabase db query --linked --file for 202606021300_omnichannel_subscriptions.sql and 202606021400_subscriptions_delivery_fairness.sql, then repaired those versions as applied. Verified remote notification tables, recipient manage/last_delivery columns, notification_check_rate_limit RPC, and social_follow_targets seeds. Remaining migration-history mismatch is older remote-only versions plus unrelated local pending analytics/view migrations.
